reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Code reading verified: VerifyDataColumnSidecar (p2p_interface.go:34-52) checks index range, non-empty commitments, and length consistency, but does NOT validate len(kzg_commitments) <= max_blobs_per_block. Spec explicitly requires this check (see fulu-p2p-interface SG-002 state transition q_check_limit -> q_reject_limit at line 15-17 of the mermaid diagram, enforcing INV-003). Attack path confirmed: oversized sidecars with 100+ commitments trigger expensive operations (trie.GenerateTrieFromItems in inclusion proof verification at p2p_interface.go:109, and kzg.VerifyCellKZGProofBatch at p2p_interface.go:83) before rejection. DataColumnsAlignWithBlock checks the block's commitment count but runs after sidecar gossip validation. Severity calibrated: Prysm has 31% CL share per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json; 31% > 5% threshold → Medium severity (below 33% High threshold). Single-packet DoS affecting 31% of consensus layer validators via resource exhaustion.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Fulu P2P Interface SG-002 verify_data_column_sidecar, INV-003: kzg_commitments count must not exceed max_blobs_per_block for the epoch
